name: vscode-evident
description: Syntax highlighting + LSP (definition, references, highlight, rename, document/workspace symbols, hover, completion, folding, diagnostics) for the Evident constraint language.

evident.lspPath.description: Path to the evident-lsp binary. Build with `cd tools/evident-lsp && cargo build --release`; the binary is at tools/evident-lsp/target/release/evident-lsp. Set this to that absolute path, or put it on PATH.

evident.lspArgs.description: Extra arguments passed to the evident-lsp binary.
